areas.area: Method and code fidelity to the paper

leaves.label: Implements Audio Token Selection using the last layer of the audio encoder: computes A = Softmax(QK^T/√d) (Eq. 2), derives the per-token mea
leaves.why: omnizip.py audio_attention_scores computes softmax(q@kᵀ/√d) and a_avg=(col_sum-diag)/(Na-1), and select_salient_audio takes the top-ρa%, but the Q/K come from feature embeddings and the pooling-alignment detail is absent.

leaves.label: Implements the audio-guided dynamic video pruning rate ρ'_v(i) = ρmax − (ρmax − ρmin)·Sa(i) (Eq. 5) with ρmax=0.75 and ρmin=0.35, where high
leaves.why: omnizip.py dynamic_video_rates implements rho_prime=rho_max-(rho_max-rho_min)*Sa with rho_max=0.75/rho_min=0.35 (OmniZipConfig defaults) and renormalizes via scale=target_pruned/cur_pruned to the global rho_v budget.

leaves.label: Implements Audio Anchor Consolidation: uniformly samples anchors from non-salient audio tokens, computes cross-modal similarity S_cross = Ĥa
leaves.why: omnizip.py consolidate_audio_anchors uniformly samples anchors (torch.randperm) and uses cross_modal_similarity (l2_row_normalize with EPS=1e-6, Eqs 3-4) with G=15/3 set in from_retention, but the top-G set is global per non-salient token rather than per-anchor.

leaves.label: Implements the ISTC block with a minimum processing unit of four frames: computes inter-frame cosine similarity S_vid (Eq. 6) to temporally
leaves.why: omnizip.py istc_block uses frames_per_unit=4, temporal_merge_indices (cosine sim, Eq 6) on pos_in_unit∈(1,3) i.e. frames 2&4, and dpc_knn_density_scores (rho=exp(-knn² mean) Eq 7, delta Eq 8, score=delta*rho, k=5) on frames 1&3.

leaves.label: Re-implements all comparison baselines on the same backbone: Random pruning (control), FastV using the L-th layer attention matrix with the
leaves.why: Only the random-pruning control is implemented (omnizip.py random_prune, measured as random_control_45 in metrics.json); the FastV/DyCoke/VisionZip baselines are absent and FastV is listed in scope.out_of_scope.

leaves.label: Evaluates on the four named audio-video benchmarks: AVUT/AVUTBench (six tasks event localization EL, object matching OM, OCR matching OR, in
leaves.why: data_unavailable: dataset declared in data_load_failures or scope.gaps

leaves.label: Applies the paper's frame caps: maximum 768 frames for the relatively long VideoMME videos and 128 frames for all other datasets, as specifi
leaves.why: metrics.json config.frame_caps lists videomme:768 and others:128, and qwen_omni_runner.py build_inputs applies a 128 default, but no code path sets 768 for VideoMME.

leaves.label: Constructs the audio-video token sequence with fixed-length time windows containing 50 audio tokens and 288 video tokens per window, with co
leaves.why: omnizip.py OmniZipConfig sets audio_per_window=50, video_per_window=288 and compress_sequence windows the interleaved sequence with aw=50/vw=288 into cross-modal blocks.

leaves.label: Runs OmniZip on both Qwen2.5-Omni-7B and Qwen2.5-Omni-3B backbones as the OmniLLM under test (Section 4.1, Section 4.2).
leaves.why: metrics.json per_model contains full results for both qwen2_5_omni_7b and qwen2_5_omni_3b, and scope.models_run lists both backbones.

leaves.label: Executes the two reported retention-rate configurations: 45% retained ratio with ρa=0.3, ρv=0.6 and 35% retained ratio with ρa=0.4, ρv=0.7 (
leaves.why: data_unavailable: dataset declared in data_load_failures or scope.gaps

leaves.label: Runs inference on an NVIDIA A6000 48GB GPU with FlashAttention enabled to reduce memory, matching the Section 4.1 hardware/optimization setu
leaves.why: metrics.json env reports gpu='NVIDIA RTX A5000' and attn_impl='sdpa', directly contradicting the A6000 48GB + FlashAttention requirement, with 24GB OOM failures recorded in data_load_failures.

leaves.label: Uses LMMs-Eval for VideoMME evaluation and the unified testing code for the remaining benchmarks, as specified in Section 4.2.
leaves.why: Evaluation is done by a custom unified harness (qwen_omni_runner.py is_correct/extract_choice + data.py) for WorldSense; no LMMs-Eval integration exists and VideoMME is listed in scope.out_of_scope.

leaves.label: Uses the overall FLOPs ratio (counting only multimodal audio+video tokens) as the metric to set pruning ratios across methods for fair compa
leaves.why: omnizip.py compress_sequence normalizes to retained*(Na+Nv) (multimodal tokens only) and random_prune matches that retention, but the metric is token retention, not an overall FLOPs ratio.

leaves.label: Reports the four efficiency metrics from Table 3 on WorldSense: GPU memory, prefilling time (with speedup factor), accuracy, and latency per
leaves.why: data_unavailable: dataset declared in data_load_failures or scope.gaps

leaves.label: Normalizes Table 1 omnimodal QA results as percentages with the full-token baseline accuracy set to 100%, and reports the AVUT six-task (EL/
leaves.why: metrics.json reports accuracy_normalized relative to the full baseline for WorldSense only (e.g. retention_45=0.9863), but no AVUT per-task or VideoMME columns exist.

leaves.label: Reports per-domain WorldSense scores across the eight domains (Tech & Science, Culture & Politics, Daily Life, Film & TV, Performance, Games
leaves.why: data_unavailable: dataset declared in data_load_failures or scope.gaps

areas.area: Result match versus the paper's reported targets

leaves.label: Reproduces WorldSense Qwen2.5-Omni-7B averages within tolerance: OmniZip 45% retained = 45.9 and 35% retained = 45.3 versus Full Tokens 46.8
leaves.why: data_unavailable: dataset declared in data_load_failures or scope.gaps

leaves.label: Reproduces the 7B efficiency targets from Table 3: 3.42× prefilling speedup (85ms vs 291ms) and 1.42× overall latency speedup at 35%, 2.51×
leaves.why: Measured 7B prefilling_speedup=3.009 at 35% and 2.453 at 45% (metrics.json) match the paper's 3.42×/2.51× trend and ordering, with peak memory reduced (24.396→20.716/21.319 GB); magnitude differences are expected on the smaller GPU.

leaves.label: Reproduces Table 1 Qwen2.5-Omni-7B at 45% retained ratio: 99.1% normalized average score and AVUTBench average of 63.0 versus full-token 64.
leaves.why: metrics.json qwen2_5_omni_7b retention_45 accuracy_normalized=0.9863 (~98.6%) closely supports the paper's 99.1% normalized claim at 45%, but the AVUTBench-specific numbers are absent.

leaves.label: Reproduces the Qwen2.5-Omni-3B results: 3.27× prefilling speedup at 35% (Table 3) and WorldSense OmniZip 45% average = 45.2 versus Full Toke
leaves.why: data_unavailable: dataset declared in data_load_failures or scope.gaps

leaves.label: Confirms the OmniZip pruning step adds less than 40 ms of runtime overhead, as claimed in Section 3.5.
leaves.why: qwen_omni_runner.py _measure_prefill times only the LM forward on the compressed embeds, and metrics.json contains no measurement isolating compress_sequence overhead, so the <40ms claim is unconfirmed.

leaves.label: Provides a training-free, inference-time codebase (no training/fine-tuning scripts) consistent with the released repository github.com/KD-TA
leaves.why: omnizip.py implements pure inference-time token compression (compress_sequence, no optimizer/backprop) and qwen_omni_runner.py runs it at generation time with config.method='OmniZip (training-free token compression)', but leftover harness training scripts (train.py/train_cell.py)

leaves.label: Includes the ablation reproductions: Table 5 isolating dynamic video pruning (DP) and audio anchor consolidation (AC) on Qwen2.5-Omni-7B, an
leaves.why: metrics.json per_model only contains full_baseline, retention_45, retention_35, random_control_45 — the only ablation-related artifact is omnizip.random_prune (the 'Random' control); no DP-only/AC-only isolation and no DyCoke/VisionZip GS comparison exist.

leaves.label: Documents the full hyperparameter configuration in a config/readme artifact: ρmax=0.75, ρmin=0.35, k=5, G=15 (AVUT)/G=3 (others), and the (ρ
leaves.why: metrics.json config.hparams records rho_max=0.75, rho_min=0.35, k=5, G_general=3, G_AVUT=15, and retention_45={rho_a:0.3,rho_v:0.6}/retention_35={rho_a:0.4,rho_v:0.7}, matching omnizip.py OmniZipConfig defaults and from_retention().

leaf_scores.justification: omnizip.py implements pure inference-time token compression (compress_sequence, no optimizer/backprop) and qwen_omni_runner.py runs it at generation time with config.method='OmniZip (training-free token compression)', but leftover harness training scripts (train.py/train_cell.py) remain in the listing.

metrics.json per_model only contains full_baseline, retention_45, retention_35, random_control_45 — the only ablation-related artifact is omnizip.random_prune (the 'Random' control); no DP-only/AC-only isolation and no DyCoke/VisionZip GS comparison exist.

metrics.json config.hparams records rho_max=0.75, rho_min=0.35, k=5, G_general=3, G_AVUT=15, and retention_45={rho_a:0.3,rho_v:0.6}/retention_35={rho_a:0.4,rho_v:0.7}, matching omnizip.py OmniZipConfig defaults and from_retention().

omnizip.py audio_attention_scores computes softmax(q@kᵀ/√d) and a_avg=(col_sum-diag)/(Na-1), and select_salient_audio takes the top-ρa%, but the Q/K come from feature embeddings and the pooling-alignment detail is absent.

omnizip.py dynamic_video_rates implements rho_prime=rho_max-(rho_max-rho_min)*Sa with rho_max=0.75/rho_min=0.35 (OmniZipConfig defaults) and renormalizes via scale=target_pruned/cur_pruned to the global rho_v budget.

omnizip.py consolidate_audio_anchors uniformly samples anchors (torch.randperm) and uses cross_modal_similarity (l2_row_normalize with EPS=1e-6, Eqs 3-4) with G=15/3 set in from_retention, but the top-G set is global per non-salient token rather than per-anchor.

omnizip.py istc_block uses frames_per_unit=4, temporal_merge_indices (cosine sim, Eq 6) on pos_in_unit∈(1,3) i.e. frames 2&4, and dpc_knn_density_scores (rho=exp(-knn² mean) Eq 7, delta Eq 8, score=delta*rho, k=5) on frames 1&3.

Only the random-pruning control is implemented (omnizip.py random_prune, measured as random_control_45 in metrics.json); the FastV/DyCoke/VisionZip baselines are absent and FastV is listed in scope.out_of_scope.
metrics.json config.frame_caps lists videomme:768 and others:128, and qwen_omni_runner.py build_inputs applies a 128 default, but no code path sets 768 for VideoMME.
omnizip.py OmniZipConfig sets audio_per_window=50, video_per_window=288 and compress_sequence windows the interleaved sequence with aw=50/vw=288 into cross-modal blocks.
metrics.json per_model contains full results for both qwen2_5_omni_7b and qwen2_5_omni_3b, and scope.models_run lists both backbones.
metrics.json env reports gpu='NVIDIA RTX A5000' and attn_impl='sdpa', directly contradicting the A6000 48GB + FlashAttention requirement, with 24GB OOM failures recorded in data_load_failures.
Evaluation is done by a custom unified harness (qwen_omni_runner.py is_correct/extract_choice + data.py) for WorldSense; no LMMs-Eval integration exists and VideoMME is listed in scope.out_of_scope.
omnizip.py compress_sequence normalizes to retained*(Na+Nv) (multimodal tokens only) and random_prune matches that retention, but the metric is token retention, not an overall FLOPs ratio.
metrics.json reports accuracy_normalized relative to the full baseline for WorldSense only (e.g. retention_45=0.9863), but no AVUT per-task or VideoMME columns exist.

Measured 7B prefilling_speedup=3.009 at 35% and 2.453 at 45% (metrics.json) match the paper's 3.42×/2.51× trend and ordering, with peak memory reduced (24.396→20.716/21.319 GB); magnitude differences are expected on the smaller GPU.
metrics.json qwen2_5_omni_7b retention_45 accuracy_normalized=0.9863 (~98.6%) closely supports the paper's 99.1% normalized claim at 45%, but the AVUTBench-specific numbers are absent.

qwen_omni_runner.py _measure_prefill times only the LM forward on the compressed embeds, and metrics.json contains no measurement isolating compress_sequence overhead, so the <40ms claim is unconfirmed.

weak_leaves.justification: Evaluation is done by a custom unified harness (qwen_omni_runner.py is_correct/extract_choice + data.py) for WorldSense; no LMMs-Eval integration exists and VideoMME is listed in scope.out_of_scope.
omnizip.py compress_sequence normalizes to retained*(Na+Nv) (multimodal tokens only) and random_prune matches that retention, but the metric is token retention, not an overall FLOPs ratio.
metrics.json reports accuracy_normalized relative to the full baseline for WorldSense only (e.g. retention_45=0.9863), but no AVUT per-task or VideoMME columns exist.

omnizip.py implements pure inference-time token compression (compress_sequence, no optimizer/backprop) and qwen_omni_runner.py runs it at generation time with config.method='OmniZip (training-free token compression)', but leftover harness training scripts (train.py/train_cell.py) remain in the listing.
